pokemon:florges.name: Florges
pokemon:florges.summary: In times long past, governors of castles would invite Florges to create flower gardens to embellish the castle domains.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: In times long past, governors of castles would invite Florges to create flower gardens to embellish the castle domains.
It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.
Its life can span several hundred years. It’s said to devote its entire life to protecting gardens.
It controls the flowers it grows. The petal blizzards that Florges triggers are overwhelming in their beauty and power.
It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.
In times long past, governors of castles would invite Florges to create flower gardens to embellish the castle domains.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: In times long past, governors of castles would invite Florges to create flower gardens to embellish the castle domains.

pokemon:floette.name: Floette
pokemon:floette.summary: When the flowers of a well-tended flower bed bloom, it appears and celebrates with an elegant dance.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When the flowers of a well-tended flower bed bloom, it appears and celebrates with an elegant dance.
It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
It gives its own power to flowers, pouring its heart into caring for them. Floette never forgives anyone who messes up a flower bed.
It raises flowers and uses them as weapons. The more gorgeous the blossom, the more power it contains.
It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
When the flowers of a well-tended flower bed bloom, it appears and celebrates with an elegant dance.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When the flowers of a well-tended flower bed bloom, it appears and celebrates with an elegant dance.

pokemon:flabebe.name: Flabebe
pokemon:flabebe.summary: When it finds a flower it likes, it dwells on that flower its whole life long. It floats in the wind’s embrace with an untroubled heart.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When it finds a flower it likes, it dwells on that flower its whole life long. It floats in the wind’s embrace with an untroubled heart.
It draws out and controls the hidden power of flowers. The flower Flabébé holds is most likely part of its body.
Flabébé wears a crown made from pollen it’s collected from its flower. The crown has hidden healing properties.
It’s not safe without the power of a flower, but it will keep traveling around until it finds one with the color and shape it wants.
It draws out and controls the hidden power of flowers. The flower Flabébé holds is most likely part of its body.
When it finds a flower it likes, it dwells on that flower its whole life long. It floats in the wind’s embrace with an untroubled heart.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When it finds a flower it likes, it dwells on that flower its whole life long. It floats in the wind’s embrace with an untroubled heart.
